tree.notes: A song about loving sports and what different sports children can do, such as running, swimming, football, basketball, table tennis, and volleyball.
tree.explanation: 这首歌提到了打乒乓球(ping-pong)和排球(volleyball)，但没有提到网球(tennis)。

children.text: "Do you like playing sports?" "Yes, I do."
children.cn: “你喜欢做体育运动吗？”“是的，我喜欢。”
children.statement: The singer dislikes sports.
children.explanation: 歌手喜欢运动(Yes, I do)。

children.text: I can run and swim.
children.statement: The singer can swim.
children.explanation: 歌手会游泳(I can swim)。

children.text: I can jump high and far.
children.statement: The singer can jump high.
children.explanation: 歌手说“I can jump high”。

children.text: I like playing sports.
children.statement: The singer hates sports.
children.explanation: 歌手表示喜欢做运动(I like playing sports)。

children.text: What about you?
children.statement: The singer is asking the listener a question.
children.explanation: “What about you?”是在向对方提问。

children.text: "Do you like playing sports?" "Yes, I do."
children.cn: “你喜欢做体育运动吗？”“是的，我喜欢。”
children.statement: The second verse also starts with asking about sports.
children.explanation: 第二段歌词也是以询问运动喜好开头。

children.text: I can play football and basketball.
children.statement: The singer can play basketball.
children.explanation: 歌手提到可以打篮球(I can play basketball)。

children.text: I can play ping-pong and volleyball.
children.statement: The singer can play table tennis.
children.explanation: 歌手会打乒乓球(I can play ping-pong)。

children.text: I like playing sports.
children.statement: The singer dislikes sports.
children.explanation: 歌手再次表示喜欢做运动(I like playing sports)。

children.text: What about you?
children.statement: The song ends with a question.
children.explanation: 歌词最后以“What about you?”（你呢？）提问结尾。

tree.notes: Daming learns to swim and shows off his other sports abilities.
tree.statement: Daming can swim at the beginning.
tree.explanation: 起初大明不会游泳(No, I can't)。

children.text: Daming's Existing Abilities
children.notes: Daming is asked if he can jump high, run fast, and play ping-pong. He can do all of these.
children.statement: Daming cannot play table tennis.
children.explanation: 大明表示会打乒乓球(Yes, I can)。

children.text: Can you jump high, Daming?
children.speaker: Child
children.notes: Asking Daming about his jumping ability.
children.statement: The child asks Daming about jumping.
children.explanation: 句子中问“Can you jump high, Daming?”。

children.text: Yes, I can.
children.speaker: Daming
children.notes: Daming confirms he can jump high.
children.statement: Daming cannot jump high.
children.explanation: 大明回答说“Yes, I can”，表示他能跳得高。

children.text: Can you run fast?
children.speaker: Child
children.statement: The speaker is asking if Daming can run fast.
children.explanation: 问句是询问能否跑得快(run fast)。

children.text: Yes, I can.
children.speaker: Daming
children.notes: Daming confirms he can run fast.
children.statement: Daming is slow.
children.explanation: 大明回答说“Yes, I can”，说明跑得快。

children.text: Can you play ping-pong?
children.speaker: Child
children.statement: The speaker is asking about table tennis.
children.explanation: ping-pong指的是乒乓球，也被称为table tennis。

children.text: Yes, I can.
children.speaker: Daming
children.notes: Daming confirms he can play ping-pong.
children.statement: Daming doesn't know how to play ping-pong.
children.explanation: 大明回答“Yes, I can”，表示他会打乒乓球。

children.text: Daming Learns to Swim
children.notes: Daming cannot swim at first, but he learns and can soon swim fast.
children.statement: Daming refuses to learn swimming.
children.explanation: 大明说“但我能学(But I can learn)”。

children.text: Can you swim?
children.speaker: Child
children.statement: The speaker asks about swimming.
children.explanation: 问句是问你会不会游泳(Can you swim)。

children.text: No, I can't. But I can learn.
children.speaker: Daming
children.notes: Daming cannot swim yet but wants to learn.
children.statement: Daming knows how to swim already.
children.explanation: 大明说“No, I can't”，说明他目前还不会游泳。

children.text: I can swim now.
children.speaker: Daming
children.notes: Daming says he is able to swim now.
children.statement: Daming still cannot swim.
children.explanation: 大明说“I can swim now”表示他现在会了。

children.text: Wow! You can swim fast!
children.speaker: Child
children.notes: The child praises Daming's swimming speed.
children.statement: The child thinks Daming swims slowly.
children.explanation: 孩子赞叹他游得快(swim fast)。

tree.notes: The inspiring story of Terry Fox, who ran across Canada to raise money for cancer patients.
tree.statement: Terry Fox ran for personal fame.
tree.explanation: 特里是为了给癌症患者筹集资金(get money for people with cancer)。

children.text: Terry's Determination
children.notes: Terry lost his leg to cancer but decided to run to help others.
children.statement: Terry Fox lost one of his arms.
children.explanation: 他因为癌症失去了一条腿(lose one leg)。

children.text: I'm Terry Fox. I like running and playing basketball.
children.cn: 我是特里·福克斯。我喜欢跑步和打篮球。
children.speaker: Terry
children.statement: Terry Fox liked running.
children.explanation: 特里介绍说自己喜欢跑步(I like running)。

children.text: But I lose one leg because of cancer.
children.cn: 但我因为癌症失去了一只腿。
children.speaker: Terry
children.notes: He lost his leg to cancer.
children.statement: Terry lost a leg because of illness.
children.explanation: cancer是一种疾病(癌症)，他因此失去了一条腿。

children.text: Can I help other people with cancer?
children.cn: 我能帮助其他患有癌症的人吗？
children.speaker: Terry
children.notes: Terry wonders how he can help others.
children.statement: Terry wants to help other people with cancer.
children.explanation: 他在想自己能帮上什么忙(Can I help other people with cancer)。

children.text: I know! I can run across Canada. And I can get money for people!
children.cn: 我知道了！我可以跑着穿过加拿大。而且我可以帮人们募捐！
children.speaker: Terry
children.notes: Terry comes up with the running idea.
children.statement: Terry wants to run across Canada.
children.explanation: 他决定横穿加拿大跑步募捐(run across Canada)。

children.text: It's hard for me. Many kind people help me.
children.cn: 这对我来说很困难。许多善良的人帮助了我。
children.speaker: Terry
children.notes: The task is difficult, but support from kind people keeps him going.
children.statement: It is easy for Terry to run across Canada.
children.explanation: 特里说这很难(It's hard for me)。

children.text: Come on, Terry! You can do it!
children.speaker: Crowd
children.statement: People cheered for Terry.
children.explanation: 人们对他说 'Come on, Terry! You can do it!' 鼓励他。

children.text: Yes, I can do it!
children.speaker: Terry
children.statement: Terry lost hope and gave up.
children.explanation: 特里充满信心地回答 'Yes, I can do it!'。

children.text: The Run and Terry's Legacy
children.notes: Terry ran for five months but had to stop due to illness. People still do the run to remember him.
children.statement: Terry Fox ran for an entire year.
children.explanation: 他坚持跑了五个月(five months)。

children.text: I keep running for five months.
children.speaker: Terry
children.statement: Terry ran for five months.
children.explanation: 他坚持跑了五个月(five months)。

children.text: But I'm very ill. I can't run anymore.
children.cn: 但我病得很重。我不能再跑了。
children.speaker: Terry
children.notes: He was too ill to continue running.
children.statement: Terry stopped because he was very ill.
children.explanation: 因为病得很重，他无法继续跑(very ill. I can't run anymore)。

children.text: Now many people do the Terry Fox Run every year.
children.cn: 现在许多人每年都参加“特里·福克斯义跑”。
children.speaker: Terry
children.notes: The Terry Fox Run is held annually.
children.statement: The run is held every year.
children.explanation: 许多人每年都做这个义跑(every year)。

children.text: Let's remember Terry with a run.
children.cn: 让我们用义跑来纪念特里。
children.speaker: Terry
children.statement: The run is a way to remember Terry.
children.explanation: 人们以跑的方式纪念特里(remember Terry with a run)。

tree.notes: A chant encouraging everyone to join Sports Day and try their best, reminding us that it is OK to fail.
tree.statement: Failing is unacceptable according to the chant.
tree.explanation: 歌谣里提到：失败也是可以接受的(It's OK to fail)。

children.text: Sports Day! Sports Day! Come on, everybody!
children.cn: 运动会！运动会！加油，大家！
children.statement: Sports Day is for select children only.
children.explanation: 歌谣欢迎每一个人(everybody)。

children.text: I can't run very fast. I can't jump very far.
children.cn: 我跑得不太快。我跳得不太远。
children.statement: The speaker can run very fast.
children.explanation: 歌谣中说跑得不快(I can't run very fast)。

children.text: It's OK. It's OK. It's OK to fail.
children.cn: 没关系。没关系。失败也没关系。
children.statement: The chant says it is bad to fail.
children.explanation: 歌谣说失败也没关系(It's OK to fail)。

children.text: Don't give up! Never stop!
children.notes: Call to persistence and hard work.
children.statement: You should stop if you are not the best.
children.explanation: 歌谣建议“别放弃，永不停止”(Don't give up! Never stop!)。

children.text: Work hard and try your best!
children.notes: Encouraging effort and trying one's best.
children.statement: The chant encourages trying your best.
children.explanation: 歌谣中提到 'try your best'，即尽力而为。

tree.notes: Dialogue listing this year's sports stars: Wang Li (runs fast), Li Min (plays basketball well & jumps high), and Zhu Chen (swims fast).
tree.statement: Li Min can swim very fast.
tree.explanation: 游得快的是朱晨(Zhu Chen can swim very fast)；李敏擅长打篮球和跳高。

children.text: Sports Stars Profiling
children.notes: Introducing Wang Li, Li Min, and Zhu Chen's abilities.
children.statement: Zhu Chen is a basketball player.
children.explanation: 朱晨擅长游泳(swim)。

children.text: Look, they are this year's sports stars!
children.cn: 看，他们是今年的体育明星！
children.speaker: Teacher
children.statement: They are music stars.
children.explanation: 他们是体育明星(sports stars)。

children.text: That is my friend, Wang Li. She can run very fast.
children.cn: 那是我的朋友王莉。她跑得非常快。
children.speaker: Wang Li's Friend
children.notes: Wang Li is good at running.
children.statement: Wang Li runs very slowly.
children.explanation: 王莉跑得很快(run very fast)。

children.text: And that is Li Min. He can play basketball very well. He can jump very high.
children.cn: 那是李明。他篮球打得非常好。他能跳得非常高。
children.speaker: Li Min's Friend
children.notes: Li Min plays basketball well and jumps high.
children.statement: Li Min can jump high.
children.explanation: 李明跳得很高(jump very high)。

children.text: Is that Zhu Chen? Yes, she can swim very fast.
children.cn: 那是朱晨吗？是的，她游泳游得非常快。
children.speaker: Zhu Chen's Friend
children.statement: Zhu Chen cannot swim.
children.explanation: 朱晨游得非常快(swim very fast)。

children.text: They're all good at sports and they all work very hard.
children.cn: 他们都擅长体育运动，而且都非常努力。
children.speaker: Teacher
children.statement: The stars do not practice hard.
children.explanation: 他们练习非常刻苦(work very hard)。
